raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table surface; there is enough lateral clearance to apply a steadying force without shifting the stack.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained and stabilized against unintended motion while box_1 is manipulated."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is accessible from both left and right sides; the arms can approach symmetrically without contacting box_2; adequate friction/contact area exists to lift a 30x30x30 cm box without claw grasping.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors and is no longer resting on box_2."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table surface; there is enough lateral clearance to apply a steadying force without shifting the stack.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained and stabilized against unintended motion while box_1 is manipulated.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is accessible from both left and right sides; the arms can approach symmetrically without contacting box_2; adequate friction/contact area exists to lift a 30x30x30 cm box without claw grasping.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors and is no longer resting on box_2.
